chunks.text: Technical Reports | EECS at UC Berkeley. Technical Reports - Satish Rao. Analysis of Hidden Markov Models and Support Vector Machines in Financial Applications (EECS-2010-63) Satish Rao and Jerry Hong. Preliminary Studies on de novo Assembly with Short Reads (EECS-2009-172) Nanheng Wu. An Improved Frequent Items Algorithm with Applications to Web Caching (CSD-05-1383) Kevin Chen and Satish Rao.
chunks.question: What are the titles and authors of the technical reports listed in this chunk?
chunks.answer: Analysis of Hidden Markov Models and Support Vector Machines in Financial Applications by Satish Rao and Jerry Hong, Preliminary Studies on de novo Assembly with Short Reads by Nanheng Wu, and An Improved Frequent Items Algorithm with Applications to Web Caching by Kevin Chen and Satish Rao.

chunks.text: Randomized Rumor Spreading with Fewer Phone Calls (CSD-04-1329) Kirsten Hildrum, Sean Ma and Satish Rao. Another Way to Find the Nearest Neighbor in Growth-Restricted Metrics (CSD-03-1267) Kirsten Hildrum, John Kubiatowicz and Satish Rao. Distributed Data Location in a Dynamic Network (CSD-02-1178) Kirsten Hildrum, John D. Kubiatowicz, Satish Rao and Ben Y. Zhao.
chunks.question: What technical reports are authored by Kirsten Hildrum and Satish Rao?
chunks.answer: Randomized Rumor Spreading with Fewer Phone Calls, Another Way to Find the Nearest Neighbor in Growth-Restricted Metrics, and Distributed Data Location in a Dynamic Network.
